page.title: Future Perfect vs Future Continuous
page.subtitle_html: Future Perfect vs Future Continuous — Future Continuous shows what will be happening at a future moment, and Future Perfect shows what will already be finished by a future limit.
page.subtitle_text: Future Perfect vs Future Continuous — Future Continuous = will be + V-ing for a process at a future moment; Future Perfect = will have + V3 for a completed result by a future limit.
